decisions.decision: Latest direct project identity controls the unique denominator; prior 157-envelope count is retained as mixed-lineage history.
Raw sensitive records remain outside GitHub; only hashes, counts, normalized requirements and safety classifications are committed.
Spooky2/frequency/bioresonance claims remain exploratory and cannot trigger medical execution or device control.
Personal diagnostic PDF and genetics/lab sources require clinician interpretation; Jarvis may organise but not make final diagnoses.

gaps.gap: 79 latest target-project conversations were absent from the older keyword-selected handover.
Claim-level primary-source validation has not been completed for all historical recommendations.
gaps.next_action: Build evidence work queue and verify highest-risk/highest-use claims against current official guidance and peer-reviewed sources.

gaps.gap: No connected encrypted health database, consent service or clinician portal is proven.
gaps.next_action: Design and stage with explicit owner approval, privacy review and least-privilege credentials.

gaps.gap: Provider directory, availability and AUD pricing are not current without web verification.
gaps.next_action: Run current official-source provider verification by requested service and location.

gaps.gap: Medication/supplement interaction record is not reconciled by a clinician or pharmacist.
gaps.next_action: Generate a review packet from user-confirmed current list without changing treatment.

gaps.gap: Device inventory, regulatory status, contraindications and operator competency are not fully proven.
gaps.next_action: Create device register; keep all controls disabled until model/manual/regulatory evidence and professional supervision are resolved.

gaps.gap: The historical archive contains 1,629 assistant safety-pattern flags requiring claim-level review.
gaps.next_action: Prioritise medication changes, device settings, invasive interventions, psychedelic dosing, cure claims and detox claims.

gaps.gap: No connected staging, production deployment or owner acceptance exists for the health module.
gaps.next_action: Complete privacy/security design, representative fixtures, independent review, staging and owner acceptance.

risks.control: Source-class separation, evidence gate and quarantine.
risks.risk: Historical assistant proposals may be mistaken for medical facts.

risks.control: No raw content in repository; hash-only ledger and restricted classification.
risks.risk: Sensitive records may expose PII/health data.

risks.control: Device control disabled and clinician/specialist review required.
risks.risk: Frequency/device parameters may cause harm or delay care.

risks.control: Current official-source verification and freshness expiry required.
risks.risk: Provider, legal-status and product claims may be stale.

truth_boundary: The source universe is materially deeper and privacy-safe requirements are locked. Clinical validation, connected systems, staging and production remain incomplete.
